extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Simon won from breakaway after POGACAR's early attack forced VINGEGAARD to chase, burning JUMBO-VISMA domestiques all day.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR attacked immediately at race start forcing VINGEGAARD to chase, depleting JUMBO domestiques for entire 193km stage.
MARTINEZ Dani bridged to POGACAR's early move creating dangerous duo that forced JUMBO to control entire race.
Final 2km climb gradient insufficient to create separation; POGACAR/VINGEGAARD mark each other to finish preventing time gaps.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: attacked from gun 193km out with no categorized climbs reached, showing psychological warfare intent over pure time gains
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: covered every POGACAR acceleration looking increasingly comfortable under pressure throughout hot day
rider_signals.MEINTJES Louis: positive: climbed 6 GC places via breakaway to 7th overall, highest career Tour finish threat
rider_signals.GOUDOUZIAN David: negative: dropped GC position suggesting form decline in third week
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: maintained 5th GC but gap increased to 4:06, losing ground to podium positions
